description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall panels, large rectangular windows, and a prominent garage attached to the front. The property includes a paved driveway, a car parked in front, and a landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is set back, partially sheltered by the garage structure. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and an emphasis on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, outdoor furniture, and a car parked in the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio area, and large windows facing the backyard, with trees framing the property.
description_view_3: Side view showing the dark exterior wall, pool area, and the transition between the front driveway and backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a flat overhang, adjacent to the garage, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
